overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked dystopian shantytown in a video game environment (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves from a waterfront magazine stand past a digital billboard, down a flooded road lined with makeshift shacks and trailers, and into an overgrown vacant lot with a basketball hoop.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded waterfront path with magazine stand

events.description: moving from magazine rack area toward open waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along a flooded path past a magazine rack toward a digital advertising kiosk

entered.detail: metal rack displaying colorful magazines and postcards
green metal railing along the waterfront edge
tall digital advertising display showing animated cyberpunk ads with MINDFUCK text
flooded area with standing water and distant shacks visible through haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rain-soaked waterfront path with a magazine rack in the foreground. The camera moves forward past green railings, approaching a digital billboard kiosk displaying animated advertisements. The ground is flooded with standing water, and makeshift shacks are visible in the misty distance.

events.description: entering the main residential street between makeshift shacks and trailers
slight left turn while continuing down the flooded road

agents.ego_description: walking down the center of a flooded dirt road lined with makeshift shacks and abandoned vehicles

notable_agents.action: abandoned red car partially submerged near a wooden fence

entered.detail: yellow corrugated metal shack with graffiti on the walls
gray mobile home with multiple satellite dishes on the roof
overhead electrical wires and utility poles lining the street
derelict red vehicle parked near fencing along the road

segments.scene_description: Leaving the waterfront behind, the camera enters a flooded shantytown street lined with corrugated metal shacks and trailers. A yellow shack stands on the right while a gray trailer with satellite dishes is on the left. The road is muddy with large puddles, and an abandoned red car sits near a fence as the camera continues forward through the rain.

events.description: turning left off the main road into an overgrown side area
entering overgrown field with scattered trash bags and abandoned furniture

agents.ego_description: turning left into an overgrown side lot and navigating through tall grass and scattered debris

entered.detail: tall wild grass and weeds covering the muddy ground
scattered blue plastic garbage bags piled near buildings
derelict sofa furniture left discarded in the field
standalone basketball hoop with white backboard

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left off the main road into an overgrown vacant lot filled with tall grass and scattered blue trash bags. An abandoned couch sits in the middle of the field, and a basketball hoop becomes visible in the distance. The ground remains muddy and flooded as the camera navigates through the debris.

events.description: approaching the basketball hoop structure in the open court

agents.ego_description: walking toward a basketball hoop in an open muddy area surrounded by chain-link fencing

entered.detail: metal chain-link fencing surrounding the court area
tall palm tree visible behind the basketball hoop

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a basketball hoop in an open muddy court area, passing by chain-link fencing. The surrounding shantytown buildings are visible in the background through the rain, with a tall palm tree standing behind the hoop. The ground is heavily flooded with large puddles reflecting the gray sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked waterfront path into the heart of a desolate, flooded shantytown. It begins by moving past a magazine rack and green railings toward a glowing digital billboard kiosk, with makeshift shacks appearing through the mist. As the camera leaves the waterfront, the scene shifts into a muddy street lined with corrugated metal shacks and trailers, passing an abandoned red car amidst deep puddles. The path then turns left off the main road and expands into an overgrown vacant lot filled with tall grass, blue trash bags, and a discarded couch. Finally, the camera navigates through the debris toward a basketball hoop and a lone palm tree, with the surrounding shantytown buildings reflecting in the heavily flooded ground under a gray sky.
